title: File manager
description: Dual-pane file-manager app window kind via ctx.registerWindowKind (extracted from core, #84). Per-pane host picker, list/preview, open-in-editor handoff, OS-file drop-to-upload, cross-pane copy/move straddling two hosts, removed-host/re-auth lifecycle. /file/* I/O (incl. destructive delete + upload) rides ctx.file. Persists byte-identical to webterm:appwindows:v1 incl. fmLeft/fmRight/fmLeftHostId/fmRightHostId/fileHostId.
author: JohnConnorNPC
